message.content: This section provides 2025 Android app and game market rankings, answering retrieval questions about top performers in ad creative volume, downloads, and revenue from January to December 2025. It contains three ranked tables: (1) 投放 TOP30, sorted by the number of deduplicated ad creatives per advertiser; (2) 下载榜 (Download Rank); and (3) 收入榜 (Revenue Rank), which tracks Google Play in-app purchase revenue (excluding third-party Android channels and ad revenue). Key entities include app titles (e.g., Vita Mahjong, Tile Explorer, Roblox, Free Fire, Candy Crush Saga, Pokémon GO), developers/publishers (e.g., 乐信圣文, Playrix, Garena, Tencent, Supercell, Scopely, King), and genres (e.g., 休闲, 益智解谜, 策略). Data is sourced from 广大大-APP Intelligence and Google Play. The section supports queries regarding market leaders, publisher performance, genre distribution, ranking methodologies, and 2025 Android ecosystem metrics.
